commands_run: coord join && coord claim android-core-axiom-binary-receipt "Android carrier lane: install/run explicit native core-axiom receipt binary on connected phone; trace back to Form/core floors and native verifier receipts; avoid camera/mic active learning, mesh learning receipts, live mesh transport, privacy/conflict, and BML compiler lanes."
failure_reason: Generated one macOS arm64 native binary and one Android arm64 native binary from a shared C source, pushed the Android binary to an authorized SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a phone, connected both endpoints over adb-forward TCP, and produced a combined core-axiom receipt. The expanded run checked 2048 width-8 affine-loss samples on both endpoints with matching checksum 8613732184965110171 and pass status. The Form receipt band returns 4095 four-way. This is an explicit one-shot carrier floor, not a background service, self-modifying binary, APK install, or runtime clang dependency.
